meta.title: Russia just BOMBED its OWN CITY?!
meta.description:
On Thursday, April 20, a Russian Su-34 dropped some sort of ordnance onto the Russian city of Belgorod. 

Here's what we know.

Confirmation of the incident in Russian state media: https://tass.ru/proisshestviya/17575185
Russian SU-34M friendly fire: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/russia-shoots-down-their-own-advanced-jet-just-weeks-after-delivery/

#russia #ukraine #invasionofukraine #su34 #short #shorts #airpower
